ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "can_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "can_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "can_office" TEXT /* Office the candidate is running for (e.g., House, Senate) */,
  "can_state" TEXT /* State the candidate represents */,
  "can_office_dist" INTEGER /* District number for congressional candidates */,
  "can_party_affiliation" TEXT /* Political party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "can_email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "can_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "can_website" TEXT /* Official website of the candidate */,
  "can_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the candidate */,
  "can_status" TEXT /* Current status of the candidate */,
  "can_filing_date" TEXT /* Date the candidate filed for the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("can_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contrib_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "can_id" TEXT /* ID of the candidate receiving the contribution */,
  "contributor_type" TEXT /* Type of contributor (e.g., IND for individual, COR for corporate) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the contribution */,
  "date_received" TEXT /* Date the contribution was received */,
  "contributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "contributor_address" TEXT /* Address of the contributor */,
  "contributor_city" TEXT /* City of the contributor */,
  "contributor_state" TEXT /* State of the contributor */,
  "contributor_zip" TEXT /* ZIP code of the contributor */,
  "contributor_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the contributor */,
  "contributor_employer" TEXT /* Employer of the contributor */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Detailed type of contribution (e.g., cash, check, in-kind) */,
  "contribution_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the contribution (e.g., campaign, general support) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contrib_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_can_id FOREIGN KEY ("can_id") REFERENCES candidates ("can_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "can_id" TEXT /* ID of the candidate receiving the loan */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "loan_from" TEXT /* Source of the loan (e.g., candidate, bank) */,
  "date_issued" TEXT /* Date the loan was issued */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., campaign expenses, personal) */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Status of the loan (e.g., active, paid off, defaulted) */,
  "loan_interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "loan_term" TEXT /* Term of the loan in months or years */,
  "loan_repayment_schedule" TEXT /* Repayment schedule (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_can_id FOREIGN KEY ("can_id") REFERENCES candidates ("can_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "can_id" TEXT /* ID of the candidate incurring the expense */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the expense was incurred */,
  "expense_category" TEXT /* Category of the expense (e.g., advertising, travel, office supplies) */,
  "expense_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor or service provider */,
  "expense_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, credit card, cash) */,
  "expense_status" TEXT /* Status of the expense (e.g., pending, paid, disputed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_can_id FOREIGN KEY ("can_id") REFERENCES candidates ("can_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disbursements" (
  "disbursement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disbursement */,
  "can_id" TEXT /* ID of the candidate making the disbursement */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the disbursement */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the funds */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the disbursement was made */,
  "disbursement_category" TEXT /* Category of the disbursement (e.g., staff salaries, travel, consulting) */,
  "disbursement_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, electronic transfer) */,
  "disbursement_status" TEXT /* Status of the disbursement (e.g., approved, pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disbursement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disbursements_can_id FOREIGN KEY ("can_id") REFERENCES candidates ("can_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "can_id" TEXT /* ID of the candidate the report is for */,
  "total_contributions" REAL /* Total contributions received */,
  "total_loans" REAL /* Total loans received */,
  "total_expenses" REAL /* Total expenses incurred */,
  "total_disbursements" REAL /* Total disbursements made */,
  "total_loans_balance" REAL /* Total balance of active loans */,
  "total_undisbursed_funds" REAL /* Total funds not yet disbursed */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, submitted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_can_id FOREIGN KEY ("can_id") REFERENCES candidates ("can_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auditors" (
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auditor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the auditor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the auditor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the auditor */,
  "auditor_address" TEXT /* Address of the auditor */,
  "auditor_city" TEXT /* City of the auditor */,
  "auditor_state" TEXT /* State of the auditor */,
  "auditor_zip" TEXT /* ZIP code of the auditor */,
  "auditor_credentials" TEXT /* Professional credentials or certifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auditor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the auditor conducting the review */,
  "can_id" TEXT /* ID of the candidate being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the audit */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (e.g., financial, compliance, operational) */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Status of the audit (e.g., in progress, completed, pending) */,
  "audit_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the audit (e.g., no issues, minor issues, major issues) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("auditor_id") REFERENCES auditors ("auditor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_can_id FOREIGN KEY ("can_id") REFERENCES candidates ("can_id")
)
